vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/demo_above_04.mp3.transcript: Look up! It's a bird, um, it's a plane? Oh, that's Saxton.

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/demo_behind_02.mp3.transcript: If you don't turn around, ya gonna be mincemeat!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/demo_medicdead_01.mp3.transcript: Bloody Hell! He killed our Medic!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/demo_nomedic_02.mp3.transcript: Aye! Did we misplace our Medic or something?

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/demo_nomedic_05.mp3.transcript: Uhh, did we forget to bring Medic?

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/demo_shield_04.mp3.transcript: HE BROKE ME SHIELD! KILL HIM!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/demo_special_01.mp3.transcript: Where are these bloody heads coming from?

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/demo_sticky_trap_02.m.transcript: I hope Mr. Hale loves explosives!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/demo_sticky_trap_04.m.transcript: Ah hahahaha! Hale's gonna like this!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/demo_wall_climb_02.mp.transcript: Wall climbing, is the bloody best!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/demo_wall_climb_03.mp.transcript: Wait, will I wall climb higher with my Caber?

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/demo_wall_climb_04.mp.transcript: I can climb this wall with both of me eyes gone!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/engineer_medicdead_02.transcript: Medic's dead! Everyone, gather near the Dispenser!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/engineer_nomedic_02.m.transcript: Looks like the only Medic who's joined us today is my Dispenser!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/engineer_setup_01.mp3.transcript: Some like to fight harder, I like to fight smarter!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/engineer_setup_02.mp3.transcript: Some like to fight harder! I like to fight smarter!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/engineer_setup_03.mp3.transcript: You may build your body by lifting weights, Hale! I build my body by lifting heavy machinery!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/engineer_setup_04.mp3.transcript: You know, that big fellow over there reminds me of my grandfather.

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/engineer_setup_05.mp3.transcript: Mr. Hale, you, sir, are about to have a real bad day!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/engineer_setup_06.mp3.transcript: Wait, if beer is called liquid bread and teleporting bread infects it with tumors, does that mean...?

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/engineer_setup_07.mp3.transcript: Ok boys, Let's bring that Big Mean Mother Hubbard down!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/heavy_medicdead_02.mp.transcript: Medic is dead! Now I am alone!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/heavy_medicdead_03.mp.transcript: Medic's dead! Now I am alone!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/heavy_medicdead_05.mp.transcript: Medic dead! Now I am alone!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/heavy_nomedic_01.mp3.transcript: Medic is not coming with us? Today is sad day.

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/heavy_nomedic_02.mp3.transcript: Was Medic not invited to ass-kicking party!?

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/heavy_nomedic_03.mp3.transcript: Medic has not joined us? NO MORE TEA PARTY FOR YOU, MEDIC!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/heavy_setup_01.mp3.transcript: Heavy will crush tiny Australian man!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/heavy_setup_02.mp3.transcript: Tiny man thinks him stronger than Heavy?

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/heavy_tickle_01.mp3.transcript: I will tickle you to death!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/heavy_tickle_02.mp3.transcript: I will tickle you to death!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/heavy_wall_climb_01.m.transcript: Heavy used to be rock climbing champion!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/heavy_wall_climb_02.m.transcript: Why do we even bother walking?

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/heavy_win_01.mp3.transcript: We did it! We killed former boss! Wait. Why we kill former boss?

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/heavy_win_02.mp3.transcript: Heavy proud of team! We killed tiny, underdressed man!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/medic_contact_02.mp3.transcript: Oh, I see him! I need protection!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/medic_contact_uber_01.transcript: I see him! Are you ready?

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/medic_setup_01.mp3.transcript: Mann Co. brand?! Feh, I made zis myself!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/medic_setup_02.mp3.transcript: Mann Co. brand?! Dummkopfs! I made zis myself!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/medic_setup_03.mp3.transcript: Remember, team, I am ze only thing standing between you and ze instant death!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/medic_setup_04.mp3.transcript: You are quite bulletproof! Vhen ve kill you, can I take a skin sample, or maybe an arm?

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/medic_wall_climb_02.m.transcript: Haha! Now zis is fass klettern!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/medic_wall_climb_03.m.transcript: Zat is not how I imagined mein career ladder.

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/medic_wall_climb_05.m.transcript: I don't need a license to climb valls!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/pyro_nomedic_02.mp3.transcript: Bhere's huh hoctor? Hed heverybodhy helse!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/pyro_nomedic_04.mp3.transcript: MEDIC!?! OHH MEDIC! WHRR AARRE YOUU?!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/pyro_setup_01.mp3.transcript: Saxton Hale? Isn't that the guy with the (incoherent mumbling)?

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/pyro_setup_02.mp3.transcript: Saxton Hale? Isn't that the guy with the (incoherent mumbling)?

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/pyro_win_02.mp3.transcript: Ihm ghnnh llht yhh uhp nnh fyrrhh!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/scout_above_05.mp3.transcript: Take a look to the skies, dumbass!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/scout_contact_01.mp3.transcript: He's over there! Let's get him!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/scout_marked_04.mp3.transcript: You just got Marked, muscle man!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/scout_medicdead_01.mp.transcript: No Medics left! Gotta find pills or something.

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/scout_nomedic_02.mp3.transcript: So Medic just decided to stay behind? You guys better hope I brought Mad Milk!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/scout_nomedic_03.mp3.transcript: Wait, we have no Medic! That can't be good.

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/scout_nomedic_04.mp3.transcript: NO MEDIC!?! Pff, who needs Medics anyway, right? Heh, heh...I do.

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/scout_nomedic_05.mp3.transcript: Wait, we're going in without a Medic?! Looks like it's back to the all-pills diet for me.

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/scout_setup_01.mp3.transcript: Man, every new person I meet is bigger than the last! What do they have you eatin'?

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/scout_setup_02.mp3.transcript: Holy crap, you're even taller in person! Is it too late to back out?

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/scout_setup_03.mp3.transcript: Saxton? Ppf, this guy's nothing! Hey, Saxton, can I get your autograph after this? As a joke, obviously.

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/scout_setup_04.mp3.transcript: Oh my God, OH MY GOD, OHMYGOD! It's Saxton Hale!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/sniper_medicdead_01.m.transcript: Our doc is six feet down under!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/sniper_medicdead_02.m.transcript: No docs left! Huh, that's not good.

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/sniper_medicdead_03.m.transcript: No docs left? I'll find a leaf and some twigs.

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/sniper_nomedic_01.mp3.transcript: Looks like Medic has better things to do than help.

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/sniper_nomedic_02.mp3.transcript: Alright, which one of you knuckleheads didn't invite our Medic?

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/sniper_run_03.mp3.transcript: Run away, run away, run away!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/sniper_run_04.mp3.transcript: Outta my way, outta my way! Can't you see he's trying to kick my butt?

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/sniper_setup_01.mp3.transcript: Time to show who the real Australian here is! You big head, wide, hairy-chest wanker!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/sniper_setup_02.mp3.transcript: All I need is a good view, some ammo, and a decent angle, and we'll be back for dinner.

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/sniper_wall_climb_03..transcript: See ya at the top, lads!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/sniper_wall_climb_04..transcript: See ya at the top, lads!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/sniper_win_01.mp3.transcript: Only the finest of shots, mate.

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/sniper_win_02.mp3.transcript: It only took one more bullet to end this.

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/soldier_contact_03.mp.transcript: Contact, directly in front of me!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/soldier_nomedic_01.mp.transcript: MEDIC! Dammit, we have none, ladies!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/soldier_nomedic_02.mp.transcript: I do not see any doctors amongst you, maggots!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/soldier_nomedic_03.mp.transcript: I do not see any doctors amongst you, maggots!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/soldier_nomedic_05.mp.transcript: Be careful, ladies, we don't have any Medics! Heh, heh, heh, heh, heh. Yeah, right.

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/soldier_setup_01.mp3.transcript: They say I should not dig my own grave! Fine! Then I will dig your own grave!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/soldier_wall_climb_01.transcript: Wall climbing is like rocket jumping, but you keep the rocket!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/soldier_wall_climb_02.transcript: Wall climb now! That is an order!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/soldier_win_01.mp3.transcript: Put on some clothes, ya hippie!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/spy_left_last_01.mp3.transcript: Of course it's my fault that you barely even scratched him. Sure.

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/spy_left_last_02.mp3.transcript: Of course it's my fault that you barely even scratched him. Sure.

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/spy_left_last_03.mp3.transcript: Stop mocking me for hiding. Just don't die next time!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/spy_medicdead_01.mp3.transcript: Oh, merde! We have lost our Medic!

vo/mercs_dt_2025_1/spy_nomedic_03.mp3.transcript: It seems our Medic has better things to do than join us!
